hints.text: Landscape: **green wooded hills + tall golden grass**

shared_with.note: Lesotho's mountains are barren; long grass is rare there.
shared_with.diff: Tall grass + trees → Eswatini; bare tabletops → Lesotho.

hints.text: Poles of **dark brown wood**, simple, insulators mostly side-mounted — **3 insulators** is the Eswatini look within southern Africa
Road numbers starting **'MR'** are exclusive to Eswatini
**Yellow outer lines**, occasionally triple white middle lines
All coverage = **white Google car w/o antenna** (Gen3 only)

shared_with.diff: Flat dry → Botswana; green hills → Eswatini.

hints.text: **Regions**: west = montane grasslands w/ pristine golden grass + pine plantations; central-south (MR9) = **dark, overwhelmingly green** wooded mountains; east = unusually flat w/ distant mountains + **sugar cane along the eastern border**

**Spotlights**: MR3 south of Ngomane = flat + long dry grass + dirt on the camera; MR3 Manzini→ZA border = the **only divided highway** (metal + stone guardrails); MR8 (SE, ZA border) = distinct ridge east; Mlawula Reserve = narrow dirt tracks + savanna; **Portuguese text → Lomahasha** (Mozambique border town)
